return_value_origin.detail: All return values originate from child outputs or parent inputs. The unsupported command branch returns literals that are explicitly allowed as BRANCH_LITERAL by the PRD. The valid command branches return the result of FormatResult, which is a child call.

child_coverage.detail: All declared children (ParseInput, PlaceOrder, CancelOrder, TrackOrder, FormatResult) are directly called in the parent code.

no_direct_access.detail: No direct reads or writes to global variables or data sources; all data operations go through child function calls.

no_cross_calls.detail: No child calls another child; all calls are from parent to children.

dataflow_conformance.detail: All declared dataflow edges are realized: parent input to ParseInput, ParseInput outputs to parent, parent payload to handlers, handler results to parent, parent handler_result to FormatResult, FormatResult output to parent return.
